title: verbascum alpestre
intro: Verbascum alpestre, also known as Alpine Mullein, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids in its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Verbascum alpestre include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Verbascum alpestre is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be applied topically as a poultice to aid in the treatment of skin conditions.
